scope: Upstream-complement natural-product / dietary / heparin-class modulators from comp-018 + comp-020 + comp-029 corpus. Each entry carries the surface (where it appears in the OE corpus) and the comp-021-relevant question (whether assay-format stratification collapses or preserves the published IC50 spread).

compounds.name: rosmarinic acid
compounds.comp_021_role: PRIMARY — the 44× spread that motivated comp-021. Operative IC50 prior in comp-029 is log-uniform [5, 180] µM.

compounds.name: luteolin
compounds.comp_021_role: Multi-mechanism (XO 550 nM, URAT1, complement CH50 190 µM). Stratification asks: does the C3-convertase IC50 hold across assay formats, or is the Zhang & Chen 2008 number assay-specific?

compounds.name: tiliroside
compounds.comp_021_role: Single-source IC50 (Jung 1998 PMID 9821813); no replication anchor. Stratification asks: is the 54 µM CP-convertase number assay-anchor-only?

compounds.name: Bupleurum smithii polysaccharides
compounds.comp_021_role: Pan-pathway active across hemolytic CH50/AP50 AND C3c-ELISA-LP. Same compound class measured in two independent assay formats with the same Fudan group — high-quality cross-format anchor.

compounds.name: Bupleurum chinense polysaccharides
compounds.comp_021_role: Same as BPs; comparison-anchor pair within the same lab.

compounds.name: falcarindiol
compounds.comp_021_role: Single-source IC50 (Chung 2011 PMID 21520473); single-format only. Limited cross-stratification possible.

compounds.name: ganoderic acid Sz
compounds.comp_021_role: Seo 2009 PMID 20091270; single primary paper; ergosterol comparator in the same paper. Stratification cross-checks the same lab's same-assay-format pair.

compounds.name: ergosterol
compounds.comp_021_role: Paired with ganoderic acid Sz in Seo 2009. Useful as a within-paper control for assay sensitivity.

compounds.name: quercetin
compounds.comp_021_role: Mid-tier hemolytic activity in Zhang & Chen 2008; gut-microbiome-deglycosylated to active form. Stratification asks: does the deglycosylated active form behave differently at MSU-relevant assay formats?

compounds.name: 3,5-dicaffeoylquinic acid
compounds.comp_021_role: Cimanga 1999 PMID 17260306 reports <10 µM at C1 component step. Critical assay-format anchor for the RA discrepancy (Cimanga's lab is the same source that reports RA at 137-182 µM).

compounds.name: K-76 / K-76-COOH
compounds.comp_021_role: C5 inhibitor; comp-018 listed but flagged as semi-synthetic only. Stratification limited (single-source assay format, narrow comparator set).

compounds.name: complestatin
compounds.comp_021_role: Comp-018 surfaced as bacterial NRPS class. Qualitative activity only in BGC-disruption study; no IC50 in matched assay format.

compounds.name: (7S,8R)-dihydrodehydrodiconiferyl alcohol
compounds.comp_021_role: Most-potent CH50 in surveyed corpus (9 µM); single-paper anchor Yin 2016 PMC6273495. Stratification: only one assay format published → cannot collapse uncertainty. Surface for the replication imperative (comp-020 §5.4 follow-up #3).

compounds.name: machicendonal
compounds.comp_021_role: Pair-anchor to DDA in Yin 2016; same paper, same assay format. Within-paper cross-check.

compounds.name: ANW (Ascophyllum nodosum fucoidan)
compounds.comp_021_role: Top-tier hemolytic CP per Jin 2015 PMC4728500 (0.98 µg/mL). Stratification asks whether the same compound class would behave similarly under ELISA-CP vs. hemolytic-CP.

compounds.name: SC (Acaudina molpadioides polysaccharide)
compounds.comp_021_role: Tied with ANW at hemolytic-CP top tier. Within-paper comparator.

compounds.name: SJW-3 (Saccharina japonica sulfated galactofucan)
compounds.comp_021_role: Second tier marine polysaccharide; same Jin 2015 paper / assay format. Within-paper comparator.

compounds.name: unfractionated heparin
compounds.comp_021_role: **Best cross-assay-format anchor in the entire scope** — published across hemolytic-CP, WieLISA-CP, WieLISA-AP, WieLISA-LP, Ficolin-3 LP, AND MASP-2 C4-cleavage in matched Talsma 2020 paradigm. Use heparin's published 50× spread to calibrate which spread comes from format vs. biology.

compounds.name: heparin octasaccharide
compounds.comp_021_role: LP-selective; same Talsma 2020 paper. Tests the LP-selectivity hypothesis.

compounds.name: heparin hexasaccharide
compounds.comp_021_role: LP-selective; same Talsma 2020 paper.

compounds.name: heparin tetrasaccharide
compounds.comp_021_role: LP-selective at WieLISA but much weaker at ficolin-3 LP and MASP-2 C4-cleavage — within-paper format-driven spread.
